economic_notes: 5 related First Nation entities accounted for by modified equity method: 424337 Alberta Ltd., Horse Lake Oil and Gas Corporation, Horse Lake Industry Relations Corporation, Horse Lake First Nation Investment Management Board, HLFN Oilfield Construction Corp. Large losses from related entities ($5.5M in 2020, $10.2M in 2019). COVID-19 pandemic noted as material uncertainty.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED - auditors unable to obtain sufficient evidence on investment in related First Nation entities ($28.9M) due to use of modified equity method instead of full consolidation for non-self-sufficient entities. Prior period restatement applied to 2019 figures. Large losses from related First Nation entities: $5.47M in 2020 and $10.16M in 2019 recorded under modified equity method. Accumulated surplus declined from $67.3M to $60.7M. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC ($3,051,807) + WCTC-ISET ($247,662) + ISC Health ($1,040,811) + CMHC ($325,564) + Government of Alberta ($268,381) = $4,934,225 government transfers; OSR = $12,150,710 - $4,934,225 = $7,216,485. No schedule of remuneration included in the extracted text. Capital lease obligations of $18,159 excluded from long_term_debt figure. Federal Trust Funds of $789,396 held by Government of Canada.
